Crafted with simple ingredients and brewed for an extended period, Hahn Ultra achieves a flawless balance of flavour and refreshing crispness, while being Zero Carb*. Delivering a satisfying, full-bodied taste without the concern of extra carbs and calories. Zero Carb*, Great Taste, How Good.

This is often refers as terroir of the region. This Cabernet offers plush herbal characteristics while still exhibiting the bright vibrant fruits of its characteristic.

At the core is the 'Oval of Sorrento', the only lemon suitable to create the exotic and refreshing flavours contained in this enticing beverage.

Their 100-hectare domain is farmed entirely using organic and biodynamic practices, spanning the region's most iconic Grand Cru and Premier Cru plots. 197773.richDescription: Bursting with intense zingy ginger and balanced out with a smooth backbone of delicate vanilla. Spicy yet mild, smooth yet sharp, but always positively refreshing. An alcoholic ginger beer truly deserving of two rugged thumbs up.

A blend of Grenache, Syrah, Mourvedre, Marselan and Carignan, grown on the right bank of the Rhone from soils covered with the round pebble stones so characteristic of the region. 961717.vintage: 2023* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

6068273.richDescription: Grant Burge Filsell Shiraz 2024 is deep crimson in colour with purple highlights. Ripe black fruits on the nose with notes of oak derived cedar and vanilla. The palate is generous and full-bodied comprising of ripe blackberry with ground spice notes. Rounding out with silky, resolved tannins and a long satisfying finish.

Delicate, smooth and full mouthfeel with distinctive notes of orange zest as well as spicy, nutty, sweet vanill

In 1847, the people of Krondorf began a wine industry that helped lay the foundation for what the Barossa is today. 140702.title: Butterfield Station North Coast Chardonnay
140702.richDescription: With fruit sourced from premiere growing regions along the North Coast (of California) expect a ripe and flavourful Chardonnay with aromas of baked apples, vanilla and buttered toast. On the palate, the flavours are generous with notes of creme brulee, ripe pear and baking spices and a lush, creamy finish. Pair with creamy pasta or a roast chicken.

309818.richDescription: Kirin Hyoketsu Lemon uses Hyoten Toketsu technology to deliver a perfect blend of sweet and sour lemon notes with a crisp, refreshing flavour. The juiciness in this beverage leaves you wanting more each time. Hard to say, easy to drink. Kirin Hyoketsu Lemon.

911140.richDescription: Famous for their popular and flavoursome Sauvignon Blanc, Giesen produce an enticing and pure Riesling from the same region, Marlborough. Displaying notes of citrus, white flowers and ginger on the nose, this attractive off-dry Riesling shows subtle sweet flavours of lemon curd, mandarin and orange peel. Those flavours are then balanced beautifully with a structured acid backbone and minerality that keeps the succulent flavours dancing on the palate for an age.

You can enjoy Fresita as an aperitif or dessert wine on any special occasion or simply to enjoy with friends.

Guillaume Gonnet Le Hardi
Cotes Du Rhone... 750ML

A single whiff of Colpasso Grillo will surely have you intrigued. Intense fresh and floral aromas lead you to a palate packed with delightful tropical flavours. Finished with refreshing acidity, this wine is perfect for those hot, lazy afternoons.


Produced by The Wine People and imported by Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

134775.title: Vodka Original 1L
134775.richDescription:
To filter our vodka we use exclusive platinum filters. Our premium vodka is bottled to the highest Swiss standards and offers a taste so soft and smooth that you can taste the delight with every sip. The highest international awards confirm our exceptional quality. A perfect fusion of Swiss Alpine water and finest European grains cultivated under ecological conditions.

Produced by F&I Beverages AG and imported by Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

136373.title: Shiraz
136373.richDescription: Dark fruits, medium bodied with fragrant spice, finishing with gentle tannins.

6034839.title: Lemon Sauvignon Blanc
6034839.richDescription:
As long as anyone can remember, these brightly coloured crustaceans have made the Marlborough coastline home. Their quirky nature perfectly reflects what Lobster Reef wines are all about. This Sauvignon Blanc has been infused with lemon to bring lively lemon and tropical flavours. Who knew your favourite Sauvignon Blanc could get any better!

Produced by or on behalf of Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

776797.title: Kentucky Straight Bourbon Small Batch 700mL
776797.richDescription:
Knob Creek is crafted in limited quantities and placed in only the deepest charred American Oak barrels to fully draw out the natural sugars. Knob Creek is a big, full flavour, pre-prohibition style bourbon that engages your senses with a maple sugar aroma and sweetness, and a rich, wood caramel flavour with a long, smooth finish.
Colour: Copper to Medium Amber
Aroma: Toasted Nuts, Grain and Oak
Taste: Rich, Sweet, Woody and Full-bodied.
Finish: Long and rich.

81376.title: McLaren Vale Shiraz
81376.richDescription: Trains played a key role in early South Australian history. McLaren Vale was a central stop for passengers on their journey between Melbourne and Adelaide before highways rendered the railways unnecessary. Now, these 'ghost rail lines' are all that's left of the bustling intercity connection; a testament to times past when trains ruled. The rolling stock that sits idle are all that's left; a Train to Nowhere. This Shiraz is a tribute to those trains that carried passengers faithfully between cit
81376.vintage: 2022* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

164552.title: Red Knot Shiraz 2018
164552.richDescription:
The Red Knot Shiraz has truly come into its own, confirming its place among Australia’s all-time best value wines. The rich blackberry core has softened beautifully, now woven with layers of mellow red fruits, stewed plum, and gently integrated spice. Time has brought out even more complexity – the aniseed notes are deeper, the texture silkier, and the finish longer. A mature, expressive Shiraz that rewards the wait – and still a delight for lovers of the style.
Produced by or on behalf of

6005681.title: Ovata Sparkling Rose NV
6005681.richDescription: Oakridge Ovata Sparkling Rose is a vibrant Yarra Valley blend of Pinot Noir and Chardonnay. It offers fresh wild strawberry and delicate floral aromas, with an expressive, fresh palate showing great line and length. Perfect for celebrations.

671171.title: Wild Berry Gin 700mL
671171.richDescription:
Greenall's Wild Berry London Dry Gin is distilled by Greenall's, England's oldest gin distillers, and the first expression of the 1761 Greenall's The Original London Dry Gin. The recipe was inspired from the blackberries growing in English hedgerows. Nose: Subtle red fruit balanced with rounded juniper notes and fresh citrus flavours. Taste: Silky smooth opening that develops into rich camphor and citrus taste with underlying fruity touch. Finish: Medium length with delicate sweetness.

905150.richDescription: Heathcote Estate has quickly emerged as an icon Shiraz producer from a region that continues to show its Shiraz pedigree. 911785.richDescription: Aged for several years in Maison Mumm’s iconic cellars, Mumm Millésimé delivers enticing, exuberant aromas. Wonderful as an apéritif or with a tasty brunch, Mumm Millésimé is marvelous with simple, refined dishes such as scallop carpaccio and oysters. Mumm Millésimé is crafted exclusively from Pinot Noir grapes harveste
911785.vintage: 2013* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

613305.title: Organic Prosecco Rosé DOC
613305.richDescription: A certified organic and vegan rose Prosecco, made from a blend of 85% Glera and 15% Pinot Nero (Pinot Noir), presented in a beautiful cut glass bottle. Elegant pale pink in appearance, enhanced by a fine and persistent foam. Intense hints of red berry fruit and flowers mixed with delicate spicy notes. On the palate it is fresh with notes of ripe pear and delicately savoury characters, well balanced and persistent.
613305.vintage: Non Vintage - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

6045018.richDescription: La Dolce Vita in every sip. This spirit captures the essence of a vibrantly red Italian bitter aperitivo-style with flavours that are distinct, crisp and contemporary. Maraschino brings balance, adding to the generosity on the mid-palate, giving length of flavor followed by a persistent, pithy dryness. Bouquet: Citrus, blood orange and classic notes of orange pith to create complexity.

673429.title: Australian Dry Gin 700mL
673429.richDescription: Manly Spirits Signiature Gin and World Spirits Awards medal winner, the Australian Dry Gin is perfect for all occasions. The coastal connection is highlighted with the use of foraged sea lettuce, creating a truly special and unique character.

482850.richDescription: Chateau Peymouton is a part of the famed Chateau Laroque, situated about 3.5km east of the medieval town of Saint Emilion. When 27 hectares of Chateau Laroque was elevated to Saint Emilion Grand Cru Classé status in 1996, the remaining 31 hectares on the property was designated as Chateau Peymounton - a new Saint Emilion Grand Cru. The Chateau Peymouton parcels are situated on the higher part of the property's plateau, where the soil is composed of fine clay over a limestone base. The wine is ma
482850.vintage: 2019* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

308393.title: Ouzo Kyma 700mL
308393.richDescription: Produced by Loukatos Distillery and imported by Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

711934.richDescription: Simonnet-Febvre has a dedication to quality Chardonnay that is unsurpassed in the Chablis region. Old vines are entrenched in limestone soil that produce some of the most evocative examples available. 237235.richDescription: Located in the heart of the Mâcon wine region, Domaine de Rochebin is situated at an altitude of 450 m, on a hilltop overlooking the Saône plain, close to Azé. This village is known for its prehistoric caves. The domaine was created in 1921, but was only dedicated exclusively to viticulture from 1972. 456984.title: 12YO Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700mL
456984.richDescription: It was 12 years ago that Ian MacMillan (Deanston Chief Whisky Maker) fully appreciated that there was a star in the making. Leaving nothing to chance he laid down the spirit in the perfect environment of their 18th century warehouses and allowed nature to run its course. Hold it to the light and consider its long journey. This is a celebration of nature at its very best; Deanston Single Malt has come of age. Un-chill filtered; Deanston retains all of its natural flavour and deep character. When

814393.title: Vodka 500mL
814393.richDescription:

900078.title: Shiraz
900078.richDescription: Voyager Estate Shiraz is deep red in colour with an explosive nose of oak blackberries and spice that is succeeded by a rich flavoursome palate and some chewy tannins. Will improve wonderfully with time.

198074.richDescription: Sliabh Liag Distillers have taken a bold step with The Legendary Dark Silkie in reintroducing consumers to rich, smoky, peated Irish whiskey. Inspired by Donegal whiskeys of days gone by, they have sourced the finest double distilled single malts and triple distilled peated single malts with soft grain whiskey. The Legendary Dark Silkie is the second release in the Silkie Whiskey Collection.

291101.richDescription: An exotic single malt from Jura that was initially matured in American white oak ex-bourbon barrels before being finished in hand-selected Caribbean rum casks. The result is aromas of guava, toasted coconut, sugar-coated almonds, apricots and orange that fill the nose, complemented by notes of vanilla fudge, mango, banana, guava, sea salt and lime throughout the palate.

908303.richDescription: A concentrated, full bodied Pinot Noir that exsudes spices, ripe dark cherries and plums then rounds of with a silky and fragrant finish.

139026.richDescription: Drawing on over a century of distilling wisdom, Ukiyo Japanese Blossom Gin is born in Kagoshima from a base of locally grown rice that is distilled into a traditional shōchū spirit. We redistill our shōchū with juniper, regional citrus, cherry blossom and native botanicals, always exercising restraint in the pursuit of clarity and perfection. The fruits of this endeavour are born out in the delicate blossom aroma that emulate those found in the mountains and coastline surrounding our home in Kag

6043337.title: Adelaide Hills Sparkling NV
6043337.richDescription:
Chapel Hill Sparkling captures the essence of the Adelaide Hills, with pristine fruit purity and seamless texture.

A premium Adelaide Hills Chardonnay Pinot Noir blend aged 24 months for a creamy texture. Savour cool climate citrus, fresh strawberry, and complex notes of brioche and almond.

6038436.title: Australian Dry Gin 700mL
6038436.richDescription: 78° Australian Dry Gin is a bright and zesty drop distilled with juniper, coriander, spice, and citrus – each selected specifically for their purity and quality. The result is a complex and textural gin with underlying spice that is complimented by a distinctly dry palate for a balanced finish. Bursting with these modern Australian botanicals, pair this gin with your favourite mixer on a hot summer’s day and enjoy!

235066.richDescription: It’s generous, easy to like, and just a flat-out enjoyable drink. Jim Barry knows his Riesling, and this one doesn"t disappoint. Aromas of lemon, grapefruit juice, brown lime and white flowers combine with a lick of mineral and wet slate on the nose. The palate is refreshing, with flavours of grapefruit and citrus rind with a white floral lift. The fruit weight shows the hallmarks of Watervale Riesling with zesty acidity, that gives line but still allows a sense of generosity.
235066.vintage: 2022* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

628995.richDescription: Sourced from vineyards in the premium Adelaide Hills wine growing region, the Sauv Blanc shows a bursts of attractive tropical fruit and a delightfully crisp acidity that gives the wine a lingering, yet refreshing, finish.

331582.title: No 85 Cabernet Merlot
331582.richDescription: Redolent of blackcurrant and fresh bay leaves, soft, juicy and finely structured. A great example of this blend so well suited to Margaret River.

250735.title: Thorpe & Smart Shiraz
250735.richDescription: Thorpe & Smart Shiraz is a celebration of individuality, history and regionality from Yangarra’s estate vineyard in McLaren Vale. This wine pays homage to the prominent pioneering families of the region – to be a true local you must either be a Thorpe or a Smart. The elevated blocks, with their variations of ancient soils and cool air flowing down from the nearby ranges, produce an elegant Shiraz with finesse.

768650.richDescription:

Produced by or on behalf of Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

60582.title: Old Kirche Barossa Shiraz
60582.richDescription: The Barossa is an area rich with history and wine has been a way of life since 1842. An area abundant of fertile soils, a diversity of culture and religion, the Barossa's landscape is still distinguished by many Lutheran church steeples. We honour this history with Old Kirche, an exquisite representation of a classic deep red Shiraz with aromas of dark berries, cinnamon and nutmeg spice. Bright flavours of plum and red currants, hints of toasty oak and a velvety, voluptuous fruit filled palate w
60582.vintage: 2018* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

32421.richDescription: If you're looking for a bright, fruity wine, look no further than Pulpo Albranino. Vibrant with a core of green apples coupled with hints of apricots and peaches, this wine is best served chilled with light snacks.

904232.vintage: 2021* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

232314.richDescription: Rainbird Watermelon Seltzer is made with natural ingredients, that’s refreshing. This Rose is a blend of 60% Chardonnay, 25% Chenin Blanc, and 15% Pinot Noir, made in the traditional Champagne method, and aged for 12-15 months on its lees to develop complexity and finesse, while at the same time retaining freshness.

Beautiful salmon pink colour, with a delicate mousse and fine

761198.title: Adelaide Hill Shiraz
761198.richDescription: Tucked away nicely in the Adelaide Hills, Sidewood Estate have made an art form out of crafting some of the very best single vineyard cool-climate wines available in Australia. Owen and Cassandra Inglis purchased the boutique property in 2004 and immediately set about making their vision become a reality. Their Sidewood Shiraz displays that vision to perfection. 761198.vintage: 2020* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

166360.richDescription: Hailing from South Australia’s famous Fleurieu Peninsula, this Vermentino features the aroma of nashi pear and lemon blossom, followed by generous lime, white peach and citrus fruit flavours on the palate. It is mostly dedicated to Chianti Classico’s signature grape, Sangiovese. While this Chianti Classico is unmistakably Tuscan in origin, it offers a level of depth, power, and concentration that is rare for its classification. 94808.vintage: 2024* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

92334.vintage: 2025* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

6005660.richDescription: Founded in 1781, Vidal-Fleury is the Rhone Valley's oldest continuous wine grower and wine negociant. A fruity, elegant style of GSM yet full of flavour - think cherry, blackcurrant, and raspbe. Super slurpy, supple, and silky, a delightful mouthful of elegance and deliciousness.

209251.richDescription: Bottega Pink Moscato Sparkling is made from exceptional parcels of grapes grown on alluvial soils in the Veneto region, close to the Adriatic Sea which provides protection from weather extremes and devers ideal growing conditions. The wine is sweet, elegant and balanced, with a long aromatic persistence.

347025.richDescription: The wine exhibits light floral aromas, overtones of raisins and syrup. The palate is typically sweet with underlying tones of citrus and stone fruit.&nbsp;

905968.richDescription: This value for money Chardonnay from regions in South Eastern Australia shows aromas of stone fruit with hints of pineapple and toasty oak. On the palate this refreshing white displays a rich texture with peach and pineapple flavours and a long, pleasant finish.

318008.richDescription: New Zealand’s riches have always been as equally worthy of protecting as they have been of sharing. This Sauvignon Blanc from the Marlborough region is no exception. This wine has lifted fresh tropical and herbal aromas. A full-flavoured, well balanced wine with juicy tropical flavours and crunchy acidity on the palate. Enjoy now with fresh oysters! 6034830.richDescription: Devil's Vine is one hell of a wine. This devilish drop is approachable, juicy yet smooth, and intensely satisfying. This wine provides aromas of red berries and plum, with flavours of cherry, raspberry, and strawberry and a hint of spice. Go on….It would be a sin not to.

55947.title: Primitivo
55947.richDescription: Colpasso Primitivo is the perfect combination of local tradition and modern wine-making, being robust at the same time as smooth and silky. Rich in fruit, with a certain “savoury” feel, Colpasso Primitivo has an abundance of ripe, dark berry flavours and is the perfect accompaniment to rich, meaty pasta dishes.

428992.title: Le Sol Syrah 2013
428992.richDescription: Le Sol (French: the soil) is born of the renowned Gimblett Gravels viticultural appellation, with its gravelly soils attracting the sun in summer and insulating the vines in winter. Intensively hand managed, the grapes reveal a deep dark Syrah with purple hues. Le Sol is always aromatically pure with a luscious yet elegant mid-palate and a distinctive fine tannin finish.

186622.richDescription: A blend of 90% garganega and 10% trebbiano di soave grown in premium vineyards in the classico region in the north east of Verona.Soft pressing and short skin contact lead to a very short time in oak.Pale yellow with golden hues; delicate fruity aromas; dry and balanced with good minerality and a lingering bitter- almond finish.

908206.richDescription: Discover the essence of sunshine in a glass with a refreshing Twist'd Spritz. The quineessential prosecco based spritz for any season. Serve chilled over ice ready to drink or serve with a slice of orange and a sprig of thyme.

134777.richDescription: Captn Webb’s Two Swallows Cherry is a super smooth premium Spiced Rum. The finest rum is married with natural Cherry, Salted Caramel and Spices. Luxardo Amaro Abano is a medium bitter, extremely popular in Italy, and especially in the Veneto region, drunk straight after a meal with or without ice to help digestion.

750024.title: Special Reserve Port 375mL
750024.richDescription: Established by Scotsman Robert Cockburn in 1815, who returned to Portugal after first visiting the country as a soldier fighting under Wellington in the Napoleonic Wars. Cockburn's vineyard holdings are some of the largest in the Douro region which gives the house valuable flexibility in selecting only the very best fruit for their ports. This Special Reserve Port is a mature off-dry style with a 'vintage character' of dried plums, walnuts and tobacco aromas and a palate that is soft and mellow

6038240.richDescription: Braulio is made from a secret recipe of over 20 mountain herbs and botanicals, which are gathered and used to create this one-of-a-kind spirit. 100053.vintage: 2019* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

The wine destined for making the Gran Reserva is set aside after the final coupages and passes into French oak barrels where it will spend between two and a half and three years, followed by another three years in bottle before its release.

355652.vintage: 2019* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

313503.richDescription: Produced by or on behalf of Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

Luxardo Amaro Abano is a medium bitter, extremely popular in Italy, and especially in the Veneto region, drunk straight after a meal with or without ice to help digestion.

442839.vintage: 2023* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

764609.vintage: 2021* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

162414.vintage: 2024* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

The winemaker promises not to be offended at all if you accidently drop a few ice cubes and a strawberry into your glass. Knock yourself out. Have a blast. Do what makes you happy!

204657.richDescription:
A strong bitter amaro, Luxardo Fernet undergoes a prolonged infusion of different herbs and spices such as licorice, cardamom, gentian and saffron. Luxardo has produced this Fernet since 1889, and it is typically enjoyed after any meal to help digestion.


Produced by Cosmopolitan Spirits and imported by Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

The result is a smooth and sophisticated Reposado tequila, offering whispers of vanilla and caramel. Savour over ice or reimagine classic cocktails. We're all in this Tequila.

308298.richDescription: Don’t miss this rare chance to secure a magnificent wine from a top producer that’s in seriously short supply. Made by an acclaimed winemaker at the top of their game, this is a slice of wine history you don’t want to miss. Add it to your collection while you can.

333721.richDescription: Capital Wines The Frontbencher Shiraz is a rich, long flavoured red wine that is perfect for cellaring. Soft tannins combine with dark berry fruits and pepper for rich taste, and a touch of spice for fragrance. Here's your perfect beef and lamb pairing.

Well known for high class, quality Sherry's, this Cuco Oloroso is made in a slightly different way than what is considered the norm. An oxidative process is used to develop the nutty, complex characters into the wine instead of the usual Flor yeast system. This produces an intensely flavoured Oloroso with a rich and smooth texture and dominant walnut notes. Th

Single Malt Scotch... 700ML

NOSE : Intense berry fruits merge with creamy vanilla and rich caramel with hints of freshly-baked gingerbread.

TASTE : Beautifully balanced and full of character. Blackcurrant and liquorice dominate in the first instance, then chewy caramel toffee and chilli-infused chocolate come to the fore.

FINISH : Rich and satisfying. Dark chocolate and caramelized raisins linger on the tongue long after the last sip is taken.

The acronym "SLH" stands for "Santa Lucia Highlands" in Monterey County, which is where this Chardonnay was grown. This vineyard is strongly influenced by the Pacific Ocean, with cool, windy afternoons that slow down photosynthesis, leading to a long growing season ideal for Chardonnay

203923.richDescription: The Philipponnat family has owned and run its Champagne house in the heart of the wine-growing areas of Aÿ, Mareuil-sur-Aÿ and Averney for over 500 years. A family of vignerons, winemakers and merchants since the 16th century, they famously supplied their wines to Louis XIV, the Sun King. Son of over seven generations of esteemed wine growers, Mr. Chiarlo is today one of the most respected producers of the fine wines of Piedmont and a leading figure in its viticultural industry. The Principe is produced with the grapes from the Nebbiolo hills in the Langa area and has been left to refine in large vats for a year. Notes of violet, red fruits and elegant fine spices.

91843.richDescription: The house of Besserat de Bellefon was founded in 1843 near Ay in Champagne, and is now based in Epernay. The hallmark of the house is the lower than normal pressure that the wine is kept at under cork. This lower than normal pressure does not reduce the effervescence, but softens it, allowing the wine to partner better with food. Aspect: Soft rose with fine clear beads Bouquet: Red berries, hawthorn, the verve of springtime Palate: Wild strawberries, refreshing, seductive Assemblage: Chardonnay,

914438.title: Hilltops Cabernet Sauvignon
914438.richDescription: One could be mistaken for thinking Grove Estate was in the heart of Coonawarra with it's vivid red soil. It's in fact nestled in the emerging region of Hilltops in NSW and with the guidance of Canberra guru, Tim Kirk, this great Cabernet shows flavours and aromas of liquorice, blackberry and rich cassis.

913418.vintage: 2024* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

Chagual is the organic wine range of Los Vascos. The chagual (Puya chilensis) is a species over two metres tall endemic to the coastal region of Chile, and it is also a model in terms of its contribution to its ecosystem. Like this majestic plant, the Chagual organic wines represent t
889339.vintage: 2022* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

84319.richDescription: Located on the southeastern shore of Lake Wakatipu, the Remarkables mountain range lives up to its name by rising sharply to create an impressive backdrop for the surrounding waters. 740789.richDescription: Botrytis cinerea, or noble rot, effects grapes in humid conditions or wet years. Carefully managed in the vineyard it can transform wines into amazing luscious and sweet dleights. Rich and concentrated the honeyed citrus, tropical and stone fruit aromas fill the glass and explode on the palate. Balancing acidity holds the sweetness in check leaving a delicious, lingering finish.
740789.vintage: 2017* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

6033484.richDescription: Lime Blossom. Bosch Pear. Floral. Textured. These grapes were harvested in the early hours of the morning and pressed upon arrival at the winery. The lightly pressed juice was cold settled and racked with light solids for fermentation. Fermentation of the juice took place in both stainless steel and neutral barrels with regular stirring. The skin contact component representing approximately 15% of the blend was plunged twice daily and then basket pressed half way through fermentation at the
6033484.vintage: 2025* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

6024726.richDescription: Unwrap the spirit of Christmas with Jumping Goat Xmas Liqueur. A festive blend of NZ vodka, rich roasted coffee, and seasonal fruit and spice. Smooth, sweet, and unmistakably Christmassy, it’s as happy sipped over ice as it is shaking up a Christmas espresso martini. Like the naughty (but nice) lovechild of Christmas cake and coffee, it’s guaranteed to put a kick in your Christmas.

373833.vintage: 2021* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

322980.richDescription: Versatile and designed to compliment food this style of Sauvignon Blanc shines. Produced from fruit grown in the western foothills of the Snowy Mountains. 317527.richDescription: ‘PIQ’, or Piquepoul, is the newest white wine from the Lienert stable. A fresh dry white akin to Eden Valley Riesling, but without all that mucking about in high altitude stuff. In a nutshell, Piquepoul is kind of like Riesling, but with a tantalising ocean mist character about it. Heralding from southern France, this crisp refreshing white has claimed ‘Official Oyster Wine’ status in its home country, such is the degree to which oysters and Piquepoul are joined at the hip. It does of course pai
317527.vintage: 2024* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

282447.vintage: 2022* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

ER_2000004933_UWCMS21.title: McLaren Vale Shiraz 2021
ER_2000004933_UWCMS21.richDescription: A showcase of single vineyard excellence, this Shiraz is a true expression of McLaren Vale terroir. With fruit sourced from one of our most treasured sites, this wine delivers purity, structure, and finesse. It's a refined representation of site-specific winemaking at its finest.

ER_2000003952_UWLS21N.title: Mclaren Vale Shiraz 2022
ER_2000003952_UWLS21N.richDescription: A round rich palate with a good backbone of tight, but deliciously mouth-watering tannins. Generously flavoured but retaining elegance. Structured to age beautifully over the long term but round enough to be enjoyed while the primary fruits are fresh and vibrant.

ER_2000003235_UWSHSHIRAZ22.title: Barossa Valley Shiraz 2022
ER_2000003235_UWSHSHIRAZ22.richDescription: Dark cherry and vanilla bean with structural layers of coffee, cardamom and mace. Fresh and juicy with a “chewy” textural tannin structure, that gives the wine persistence and length.

ER_2000004110_002.title: Pink Gin 700mL
ER_2000004110_002.richDescription: Citrus forward. This gin has been steeped in rose petals, pomegranate and dark citrus.

ER_2000004933_UWCT24.title: McLaren Vale Tempranillo 2024
ER_2000004933_UWCT24.richDescription: This Tempranillo bursts with vibrant aromas of dark cherry, red plum and hints of dried fig, layered with subtle notes of spice, mocha and earthy nuances. On the palate, this McLaren Vale expression is juicy, medium-bodied and beautifully textured, offering ripe red and dark fruits supported by supple tannins and a savoury edge typical of the variety.

ER_2000004110_006.title: Australian Whisky 700mL
ER_2000004110_006.richDescription: The Melone brothers have created a whisky that is a celebration of tradition and craftsmanship using techniques passed down from their grandfather. Made from 100% Australian malted barley and carefully aged in a combination of ex-bourbon and maple barrels, this spirit offers a rich, complex character. The ex-bourbon barrels lend subtle layers of vanilla, caramel, and citrus, while the maple barrels add a delicate touch of sweetness, creating a smooth and balanced finish.

ER_2000004933_CSMG22.title: McLaren Vale Grenache 2023
ER_2000004933_CSMG22.richDescription: This Small Batch Grenache is an early release grenache. bright fruit characters bursting out of your glass. The Grenache fruit was selectively handpicked from 120-year-old bush vines. Gently destemmed and cold-soaked for 14 days. Slowly Fermented for a further 14 days then gently pressed into stainless steel tanks.

ER_2000004933_UWCPN23.title: South Australian Pinot Noir 2023
ER_2000004933_UWCPN23.richDescription: This Pinot Noir opens with lifted aromas of wild strawberry, red cherry and raspberry, complemented by subtle hints of rose petal, spice and forest floor. The palate is elegant and bright, showcasing vibrant red fruits, a silky texture, and finely woven tannins that glide effortlessly.

ER_2000005313_UWHHCH24.title: Yarra Valley Chardonnay 2024
ER_2000005313_UWHHCH24.richDescription: A complete expression of Yarra Valley Chardonnay. Florals, green apple, spice, hazelnut, stonefruit and more. Plenty of acid here, a creamy palate and judicious use of French oak.

ER_2000004091_UWOMMSHIRGREN22.title: McLaren Vale Shiraz Grenache 2022
ER_2000004091_UWOMMSHIRGREN22.richDescription: 75 yo Shiraz and 95yo bush vine Grenache have made a truly remarkable McLaren Vale blend full of chocolate and spice. 97/100 Kim Brebach... buy as much of this as you can... we agree, this is exceptional value

ER_2000004933_UWCSBD21.title: Durif 2025
ER_2000004933_UWCSBD21.richDescription: This Small Batch Durif displays a full-bodied plush palate with bright & vibrant berry fruits including black cherry, blueberry, raspberry, and mulberries with hints of spice. Silky tannin finish and great balance.

ER_2000004933_UWCQOHR24.title: Rose 2024
ER_2000004933_UWCQOHR24.richDescription: Strawberry-infused citrus open the bottle, lifted aromas of ripe strawberries intermingle with zesty hints of citrus, creating a fragrant bouquet that promises a sensory journey like no other. Every glass is an invitation to indulge in elegance, vibrancy, and a taste of the finer things in life. Whether shared with loved ones or enjoyed in quiet contemplation, this rosé is sure to steal your heart.

ER_2000005313_UWHHPN24.title: Yarra Valley Pinot Noir 2024
ER_2000005313_UWHHPN24.richDescription: Rich red fruits of raspberry and red cherry, spice and florals. Medium bodied it boasts firm tannins and a delicate minerality balanced by refreshing acidity.

ER_2000005231_JMGC001.title: Golden Cream Pistachio Liqueur 700mL
ER_2000005231_JMGC001.richDescription: Historically made in southern Italy since 1885, Michele Jannamico's Pistachio Liqueur, this exquisite pistachio cream liqueur, is a popular and refreshing European marvel. Fresh pistachios harvested in Abruzzo give this smooth liqueur an aromatic and unbeatable taste. Enjoy over ice, straight up and chilled, or use it to level up your cocktails with a unique and unbeatable flavour.

ER_1000007078_23FBCH.title: Adelaide Hills Chardonnay 2023
ER_1000007078_23FBCH.richDescription: Adelaide Hills Chardonnay at it’s best. A single vineyard and single block this is a great representation of Premium Adelaide Hills Chardonnay. Hand-picked, whole bunch pressed, wild yeast ferment, heavy solids and partial MLF in new and aged French Oak barrels give this wine a complex, deep and lingering finish supported by the lovely red apple, white stone fruit and soft oak aromas. This is a classic style Chardonnay with a lovely creamy finish on the palate balanced with exquisite minerality!

ER_1000003936_VK19SASC12DOUW.title: South Australia Shiraz Cabernet 2019
ER_1000003936_VK19SASC12DOUW.richDescription: Crafted from the premium Limestone Coast and Langhourne Creek vineyards, known for their exceptional fruit. COLOUR – Dark and Intense Red AROMA – Classic berry fruits, supported by plum and blackcurrant notes and toasty oak PALATE – Know as ‘the perfect pair’ Shiraz and Cabernet both complement each other to make this a complete wine. Delightful spice with cassis, mocha and licquorice the wine is full bodied with a bold but round finish.

ER_2000005231_JMGC004.title: Golden Cream Choco Rum Liqueur 700mL
ER_2000005231_JMGC004.richDescription: Michele Jannamico's Chocolate Rum Liqueur is a decedent innovation of luxurious flavour and Italian tradition. Rich chocolate and smooth rum combine to create an aromatic and unbeatable taste. Delectable over ice, straight up and chilled, or use it to level up your cocktails, affogatos, or coffee mixes with a unique and unbeatable flavour.

ER_2000005398_WB0042.title: 4.2 Lager 330mL
ER_2000005398_WB0042.richDescription: A WINGMAN knows there’s nothing worse than a beer that’s not quite cold enough, which is why our label changes from silver to blue to let you know when it’s at the perfect drinking temperature.

ER_1000004677_KOZELLAGER.title: Premium Lager 500mL
ER_1000004677_KOZELLAGER.richDescription: Kozel Premium is the most popular Czech beer in the world! Kozel Premium is made with three selected malts and the aromatic Czech hop Premiant for a well-balanced taste, welcome bitterness and full body. 4.6 % ABV

ER_2000004091_UWDADSCUTSHIR22.title: Adelaide Hills Shiraz 2022
ER_2000004091_UWDADSCUTSHIR22.richDescription: This full-bodied and dry red wine offers a rich tapestry of flavor, balancing luscious fruit notes with a captivating savoury undertone. It delivers a gentle warmth on the palate, highlighted by subtle spicy accents, leading into an incredibly smooth and velvety finish.

ER_2000005231_JMGC002.title: Golden Cream Lemoncello Liqueur 700mL
ER_2000005231_JMGC002.richDescription: Historically made in southern Italy since 1885, Michele Jannamico's Lemoncello Cream Liqueur is a popular and refreshing Italian marvel. Lemon peals from the heart of Capri give this smooth liqueur an authentic and unbeatable taste. Enjoy over ice, straight up and chilled, or use it to level up your cocktails with a unique and unbeatable flavour.

ER_1000004677_DUNKEL.title: Dunkel Weißbier 500mL
ER_1000004677_DUNKEL.richDescription: Erdinger Dunkel has aromas of spiced fruit and smooth toffee, a light taste courtesy of quality produced, locally grown Bavarian Hallertau hops with balanced sweet, malty flavours and gently tart fruit, leaving a full bodied, light bitter finish.

ER_1000007652_ASBS10.title: Premium Museum La Croyance SBS 2010
ER_1000007652_ASBS10.richDescription: The judicious use of oak has added complexity to the fresha and fragrant nature of the variety; the palate is lively and direct,with only alittle toastiness lingering on the long and complex finish.

ER_2000003315_WFG81021.title: Hunter Valley Shiraz 2019
ER_2000003315_WFG81021.richDescription:
This Hunter Shiraz is intense crimson in colour, with dense purple to the rim. Aromas are equally powerful and enticing: full perfumes of blackcurrant and black cherry fill the glass with cassis-like inkiness, combining with deep oak-spice aromas of vanilla and subtle scents of sandalwood and vanilla.
The palate is equally compelling, showing fully ripe, rich and bold Hunter Shiraz, delivering a dense core of black cherry with beautiful spicy freshness. The drought of 2019 has generated signi

ER_1000003299_NS1610UB.title: Italian Amaretto Liqueur 500mL
ER_1000003299_NS1610UB.richDescription:
Amaretto is an almond-flavoured Italian liqueur. The name amaretto comes from Italian which means " slightly bitter", in references to the distinctive flavour of the almond used in its recipe. It is soft on the palate with a sweet almost marzipan like flavour.
Santa Marta Amaretto is made of 100% natural ingredients: an infusion of apricot, cherry and bitter almond stones, toasted cocoa beans, vanilla pods, orange peel and orange blossom. After a short fermentation this infusion is distilled

ER_1000004677_KUYPERPUCKER.title: Sour Apple Pucker Liqueur 700mL
ER_1000004677_KUYPERPUCKER.richDescription: Sour Apple Pucker is a sweet and sour sensation. A burst of sweet flavour followed by a mouth puckering sour. Get ready to pucker up!

ER_1000004677_KUYPERBROWN.title: Crème de Cacao Brown 700mL
ER_1000004677_KUYPERBROWN.richDescription: In medievil time French monks started brewing alcohol with cocoa beans, which proved an excellent way to spend their long, quiet days in the monastery. Our Creme de Cacao is dark, intense, sweet, and packs lots of deep chocolate notes plus a lovely hint of vanilla. The taste is slightly more bitter than its colourless brother Creme de Cacao White. The ideal ingredient for a killer Chocolatre Martini or a classic Brandy Alexander cocktail.

ER_1000004677_SHERIDAN1L.title: Coffee Layered Liqueur 1L
ER_1000004677_SHERIDAN1L.richDescription: Sheridan's Coffee Layered Liqueur, popularly known as Sheridan coffee liqueur, boasts two vessels inside the bottle. One side is divine 'white chocolateness', the other, sweet coffee. When poured, the two sides combine, resulting in an Irish Coffee marriage of pure delight!

ER_1000004677_KUPERMENTHE.title: Creme De Menthe Liqueur 700mL
ER_1000004677_KUPERMENTHE.richDescription: So Fresh, so clean, so sweet. Creme de Menthe White has it all, the only thing it lacks is colour. But you can't judge a bottle by its colour, now can you? What's inside is a dazzling fresh taste of mint, lemon oils, fine sugars and a strong backbone of alcohol. ER_2000004569_DCBPN.title: Petillant Naturel Rose 2023
ER_2000004569_DCBPN.richDescription:
The opportunity arose in 2023 to work with more Malbec than usual and hot on the heels of our successful debut fizz, Dan knew just what to do with extra fruit; Pink Pet Nat.

This is 100% Bridge Pa Malbec that is produced through an ancient method by bottling partially-fermented wine and allowing the yeast to finish their job in the bottle which traps in the natural bubbles. The spent yeast hulls, aka "lees", remain in the bottle so the wine has a natural haze to it. With refrigeration,

ER_2000004459_47.title: Fleurieu Cabernet Shiraz 2021
ER_2000004459_47.richDescription: Blended Cabernet Sauvignon 40%, Shiraz 40% and Merlot 20%.

ER_2000004459_46.title: Fleurieu Cabernet Sauvignon 2021
ER_2000004459_46.richDescription:
Appearance: Dark Purple Res.
On Nose: Blackcurrent fruity aroma.
On Palate: Full-bodied.
Mouthfull: Fairly strong on edge length very good.
Pairing with Food: Paring with veal and marm vegitables.
Drinks: 2022 - 2024.

ER_2000004459_45.title: Fleurieu Shiraz 2021
ER_2000004459_45.richDescription:
Appearance: bright
On Nose: floral and fruity, zinc oxide-inflected, with generous, slightly green aromas of fresh herbs, pepper, cordite and black cherry fruit
On Palate: peppery, light and acid high and juicy
Mouthfeel:, smooth, lively, medium weight, a bit thin and fairly tart-edged with crusty tannin. The length is good to very good, with the pepper and green notes echoing on the finish.
Paring with Food: Real meatness
Drinks: 2022 – 2024. Chill lightly

ER_2000004459_12.title: Rionnach Maoim CSM 2021
ER_2000004459_12.richDescription:
Made from Vineyard to bottle. Low yields cool climate grapes from Nangkita Single Vineyard. Deep sandy soil and limestone beneath, rich in elements for natural aromas and flavours. Blended Cabernet Sauvignon 40%, Syrah 40% and  Merlot 20%. Smooth and less harshness of the blend making the wine easy.
It's splendidly fragrant and enticing with dark plum, cherry, clove and toasted almond notes, leading to a beautifully rounded palate displaying fleshy texture and silky flow. Succulent and s

ER_2000004313_JS017.title: Canberra District Shiraz 2017
ER_2000004313_JS017.description:
Jirra Wines At Jeir Station
Canberra District... 750ML
ER_2000004313_JS017.richDescription: A Shiraz with a colour of medium garnet and rich aromas of blackberries and hints of vanilla. a medium bodied Shiraz with ripe rannins that reveals rich flavours of blackberries and a distinct spice of black pepper.

ER_2000004225_BLB22FRS.title: Flynn Reserve Shiraz 2022
ER_2000004225_BLB22FRS.richDescription:
Sourced from the Eden Valley, sub region of the Barossa Valley.
Completed in a natural fermentation process, while aging in new mild French oak puncheons for 16 months and maturing for a further 6 months before releasing.
An elegant, earthy character with vibrant acidity leading into optimal, balanced tannins.
Made as natural as possible, leaving the terroir to shine through.

ER_2000004225_2022BLBG.title: Old Vine Grenache 2022
ER_2000004225_2022BLBG.richDescription:
Picked mid March, with a natural fermentation process, aged in French oak for 14 months.
Staying true to its previous vintages with its elegant warm spice and delicate structure, showcasing all red fruits and floral notes finishing with a beautiful acidity.

ER_2000004087_2019VOY.title: Vee On Yay 2019
ER_2000004087_2019VOY.description:
Vee On Yay By Peerick Vee On
Yay 2019 750ML
ER_2000004087_2019VOY.richDescription: Vee On Yay ! is crashing the party and taking back the unrivalled delight of an effortlessly good white wine. Peerick's vibrant Viognier (pronounced Vee On Yay) is a rewarding and fruity tipple crafted in the heart of the rugged Australian Pyrenees. Rich and full-flavoured yet easy-drinking, Vee On Yay is the punchy white wine disruptor for platters, picnics, and parties. An elusive grape variety steeped in French heritage, it's exciting to drink and exciting to talk about. We're marching toward

ER_2000003829_934007400168.title: Reserve Eden Valley Pinot Gris 2019
ER_2000003829_934007400168.description:
Blue Rock Wines Reserve Eden
Valley Pinot Gris... 750mL
ER_2000003829_934007400168.richDescription: 2019 Reserve Pinot Gris Our Family Series Reserve Pinot Gris has delicate floral aromas of musk and ripe pears. The palate is soft and full, with hints of spice and musk, balanced with ripe pears and fresh acidity.

ER_2000003829_9340074001215.title: Barossa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon 2015
ER_2000003829_9340074001215.richDescription: 2015 ’Pantelis’ Cabernet Sauvignon  The Pantelis Cabernet Sauvignon is our signature wine and bears the name of the family patriarch. Pantelis Zachopoulos (1927-1998) immigrated to Australia from Greece in 1966 with his wife Olga and four children. His diverse agricultural knowledge was passed onto his children Michael, Nicholas and myself [Zissis]. In 1998 a few months before his passing we purchased and began establishing our vineyard in the Barossa Ranges. I decided to make this wine in his h

ER_2000003808_CSV19.title: Single Vineyard Chardonnay 2019
ER_2000003808_CSV19.richDescription:
A refreshing wine, a part of the Single Vineyard Collection from our Canyonleigh cool climate vineyard.
Tasting Notes
Pale yellow-straw colour.
White peach and a little oak on the nose.
Medium body, with attractive white peach flavours and light nuttiness from oak.
Finishes with nicely persistent flavours.

ER_2000003581_STAPGRSR.title: Special Release Pinot Gris 2024
ER_2000003581_STAPGRSR.richDescription:
Unlike most wines of the variety, our 2024 Special Release Pinot Gris is wildly unique, refined with minimal barrel aging to completely shift the dynamic of the blend.
Initial aromas show delicious characteristics of wild peach and crunchy green fruits like pear and apple, like a typical Pinot Gris. What really sets it apart is the notes of butter and vanilla on the palate balanced by a crisp acidity thanks to a short time in our French Oak barrels. When pairing with food, its complex flavou

ER_2000003550_R-CS-300ML-TR-24.title: Tasmanian Raspberry Sparkling Water 300mL
ER_2000003550_R-CS-300ML-TR-24.richDescription: 10% Australian Tasmanian Raspberry Juice + Sparkling water and nothing else LOCAL - Sourced from the pristine central highlands of Victoria RECYCLABLE - Aluminium cans are the most recycled packaging product in the world INFINITE RECYCLING - Can be recycled endlessly without compromising any of its quality RETAINS BUBBLES - Stays fresh and sparkling for longer A fruit rumoured to have been eaten since prehistoric times. ER_2000003550_R-CS-300ML-BO-24.title: Blood Orange Sparkling Water 300mL
ER_2000003550_R-CS-300ML-BO-24.richDescription: 10% Australian Blood Orange Juice + Sparkling water and nothing else LOCAL - Sourced from the pristine central highlands of Victoria 100% RECYCLABLE - Aluminium cans are the most recycled packaging product in the world INFINITE RECYCLING - Can be recycled endlessly without compromising any of its quality RETAINS BUBBLES - Stays fresh and sparkling for longer Crimson red flesh. ER_2000003501_B005.title: Tasting Box - Classic, Coast & Wild Hibiscus 200ml Non-Alcoholic Spirit
ER_2000003501_B005.richDescription:
A tasting box of of our three international award winning Non-Alcoholic spirits so you can choose your favourite!
Seadrift Coast - distilled with fresh basil, juniper and lemongrass a great non-alcoholic gin.
Seadrift Wild Hibiscus - distilled with fresh juniper, kaffir limes and infused with hibiscus, delicious with a celebratory pink hue!
Seadrift Marine - distilled with fresh corriander, kaffir lime leaves and lemongrass, Inspired by marine botanical vodkas it is super refreshi

ER_2000003501_00004.title: Wild Hibiscus Non-Alcoholic Spirit 700mL
ER_2000003501_00004.richDescription: A pink coastal non-alcoholic 'gin' style product. Distilled from Juniper berries, fresh basil, rosemary and infused with wild hibiscus flowers. The drink opens on sweet tropical notes of hibiscus flowers and freshly torn basil leaves. This evolves into the peppery notes of juniper berries and rosemary backed by a citrus zing of lemongrass.

ER_2000003490_PW22RESCAB.title: Reserve Cabernet 2022
ER_2000003490_PW22RESCAB.richDescription:
Winemaker notes
Colour: Deep crimson
Bouquet: Brooding blackberry, mulberry, dark chocolate and cedar aromas typify the aromatic profile of this reserve style.
Palate: The palate is rich and powerful showing generous redcurrant, mulberry and dark chocolate flavours. A soft and supple backbone of tannin gives this Cabernet a long and precise evolution through the palate.
Viticulture
Grown on the Wildberry Estate vineyard this parcel of fruit enjoys one of the more sought-after addr

ER_2000003490_PW22CAB.title: Margaret River Cabernet 2022
ER_2000003490_PW22CAB.richDescription:
Variety: 100% Cabernet Sauvignon
Region: 100% Margaret River
Sub-region: Wilyabrup Walcliffe
Cellaring Potential: 5-10 years
Winemaker notes
Bouquet: Black and red berry fruit are complemented by earthy graphite and dark chocolate notes. Maturation in seasoned French oak gives a subtle background of vanilla and spice.
Palate: Medium bodied and vibrant palate sums up this wonderful expression of Wilyabrup Cabernet. The palate is fresh and full of vibrant mulberry, cassis and bla

ER_2000003482_NVSPKFRALAR12.title: Sparkling
ER_2000003482_NVSPKFRALAR12.richDescription: Bright apple and pear aromas meet citrus blossom and a fine, elegant fizz, with subtle oak-driven notes of vanilla and spice rounding out this refined French sparkling.

ER_2000003482_NVPROSEADON12.title: Prosecco NV
ER_2000003482_NVPROSEADON12.richDescription: Floral and tropical fruit aromas with a touch of honeycomb. The palate is light and spritzy with a flavoursome and crisp finish. Pairs beautifully with a charcuterie grazing platter, prosciutto-wrapped cantaloupe, or lightly fragrant salads.

ER_2000003482_25SBLSEASHS12.title: Sauvignon Blanc 2025
ER_2000003482_25SBLSEASHS12.richDescription: Zesty lime and tropical aromas leap from the glass, followed by a grassy, herbaceous lift. On the tongue, vibrant citrus and melon flavours dance with bracing acidity.

ER_2000003482_25RIESEASOA12.title: Riesling 2025
ER_2000003482_25RIESEASOA12.richDescription: This Riesling showcases vibrant flavors of lime, lemon zest, and crisp green apple. Subtle floral aromas intertwine with a clean minerality, delivering a refreshing, well-structured palate.

ER_2000003482_25PROKIVMOT12.title: King Valley Prosecco 2025
ER_2000003482_25PROKIVMOT12.richDescription: This elegant Prosecco showcases the King Valley’s finesse with notes of nashi pear, citrus blossom, and green apple. On the palate, it’s light and vibrant with soft bubbles and a hint of minerality. Balanced and dry, it pairs beautifully with seafood, antipasti, or casual celebrations.

ER_2000003482_25PIGSEASHS12.title: Pinot Grigio 2025
ER_2000003482_25PIGSEASHS12.richDescription: Lifted aromas of juicy ripe pear, green apple and subtle floral notes. The palate is rich, displaying flavours of honeysuckle and lemon with a crisp, zesty and refreshing finish. Pair with fish tacos, roast chicken or mushroom risotto.

ER_2000003482_25CSVSEAPIH12.title: Cabernet Sauvignon 12 Bottles 2025
ER_2000003482_25CSVSEAPIH12.richDescription: The 2025 Pickers Hut Cabernet Sauvignon opens with expressive aromas of ripe blackcurrant, blackberry, and dark cherry, complemented by subtle notes of cedar, vanilla, and a hint of spice. On the palate, it is medium to full-bodied, showcasing well-structured tannins and balanced acidity. Flavors of dark fruit are layered with touches of oak, cocoa, and gentle herbal nuances, leading to a smooth, lingering finish.

ER_2000003482_25CSVSEAFAT12.title: Cabernet Sauvignon 12 Bottles 2025
ER_2000003482_25CSVSEAFAT12.richDescription: The 2025 Fat Tree Cabernet Sauvignon showcases a rich bouquet of blackcurrant, ripe plum, and dark cherry, layered with subtle hints of vanilla, cocoa, and toasted oak. On the palate, it is full-bodied with firm, velvety tannins and balanced acidity, offering flavors of dark berries, cassis, and a touch of spice. The finish is long and elegant, leaving a lingering impression of depth and complexity.

ER_2000003482_23SHZMCLCAL12.title: McLaren Vale Shiraz 2023
ER_2000003482_23SHZMCLCAL12.richDescription: This McLaren Vale Shiraz displays the trademark varietal characters; Rich and generous with black cherries and white pepper. Matured in oak, this is a full bodied wine with a long lasting fruit-packed finish. This wine will compliment a wide variety of meal choices, especially red meat.

ER_2000003482_23SHZBVSAD12.title: Barossa Valley Shiraz 2023
ER_2000003482_23SHZBVSAD12.richDescription: A robust yet balanced Shiraz, showcasing craftsmanship, warmth and approachability. Medium to full-bodied with generous dark-fruit flavours, balanced by savoury spice and earthy undertones. Well-integrated oak adds hints of mocha and vanilla, while fine-grained tannins provide structure and depth. Rich aromas of ripe blackberry and dark cherry, complemented by notes of black pepper, anise and subtle smoky oak. Smooth and lingering, with gentle spice and soft tannin grip.

ER_2000003482_23PINYARFTV06.title: Yarra Valley Pinot Noir 2023
ER_2000003482_23PINYARFTV06.description:
From The Valley Yarra Valley
Pinot Noir 2023 750ML
ER_2000003482_23PINYARFTV06.richDescription: The bouquet displays vibrant characters of dark cherry and plum. Use of French oak adds further layers of complexity to the aromas. The wine has great presence, texture and length. The palate is long and finishes with powdery, yet persistent tannins. Ripe and powerful, a great Yarra valley Pinot Noir which will also reward careful cellaring.

ER_2000003482_20CSVCOOTNT12.title: Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon 2020
ER_2000003482_20CSVCOOTNT12.richDescription: Lifted aromas of vanilla and spicy oak are exhibited in this Cabernet Sauvignon. Deep flavours of blackcurrant and mulberry fruit, followed by hints of nutmeg, lingering chocolate oak and balanced tannin, lead to an elegant finish. Beautifully paired with slow roasted lamb or rich duck dishes.

ER_2000003315_WIL81031.title: Hunter Valley Semillon Verdelho 2019
ER_2000003315_WIL81031.richDescription:
Bright and strong straw-green with fine yellow flecks.
Powerful, tropical testiness fills the glass, showing rich varietal aromas of fresh lime, guava, pineapple and kiwifruit, plus floral perfumes of honeysuckle. The palate is flavour-packed, full of peachy fruit richness and length, with satiny texture and exotic allure.
This lovely Verdelho is ready for young drinking, yet will keep well for short-term cellaring up to 4 to 5 years from vintage.

ER_2000003208_VODKA750.title: Vodka 750mL
ER_2000003208_VODKA750.richDescription:
Our newest product in our range!
Created from Sugar Cane, our carbon filtered vodka brings you a smooth taste for your enjoyment, whether its straight or blended in cocktails the choice is yours!

ER_2000003208_SERRPORANGPOM.title: Serpent and Dove - Blood Orange & Pomegranate Gin
ER_2000003208_SERRPORANGPOM.richDescription:
Ace ‘s Gin – Handcrafted using a high-quality spirit, a fruity semisweet, smoky, earthy gin, infused with blood orange, pomegranate and a touch of honey!

Pleasant on the nose with hints of tart cherries and raspberries.
This Serpent and Dove's blood orange gin best served on ice or with a classic tonic, fresh raspberries and blueberries!

ER_2000003203_1693.title: Crave Blue Creaming Soda 600mL
ER_2000003203_1693.richDescription: In 1910 the Wimmers family set up a soft drink manufacturing plant at Nambour on the Sunshine Coast, later moving to Cooroy where it is still manufactured today. It was at the Sunshine Coast plant Wimmers Soft Drinks became the first company in Australia to blend and develop Lemon Lime and Bitters in a bottle. One hundred years later, Wimmers Soft Drinks still uses the same old recipes to ensure their beverage range tastes as good today as it did all those years ago.

ER_2000003033_SJBSHZ24.title: Brook Shiraz 2024
ER_2000003033_SJBSHZ24.richDescription: This medium-bodied Shiraz brims with dark mulberries, plum, blueberry and a little cherry on the nose. The palate is smooth and generous, opening with juicy dark fruit before shifting into subtle liquorice and dark chocolate tones. A lift of red currant carries through the finish, leaving the wine refined, balanced and wonderfully approachable.

ER_2000003033_SJBSB.title: Margaret River Brook Sauvignon Blanc 2023
ER_2000003033_SJBSB.description:
St Johns Wine Margaret River
Brook Sauvignon... 750ML
ER_2000003033_SJBSB.richDescription:
The uniqueness of this Sav Blanc is the blend of other varietals giving brightness and complexity.
Bursting with lively aromas of fresh-cut grass alongside gooseberry and white florals. Palate is fresh and lively, with notes of passionfruit, guava and tropical fruit. Its textural quality enhances the complexity and balance of the wine, ensuring it is thoroughly enjoyable.

ER_2000003033_SJBCHARD.title: Margaret River Brook Chardonnay 2023
ER_2000003033_SJBCHARD.description:
St Johns Wine Margaret River
Brook Chardonnay... 750ML
ER_2000003033_SJBCHARD.richDescription:
Tasting: This Chardonnay captures the very essence of what Margaret River Chardonnay is highly regarded for while simutaneaously including a modern palate. Great fruit expression with creamy stone fruit and fresh apple melded with bright citrus with a hint of tropical fruit. Rich mouthfeel and rounded palate siplaying hints of vanilla and butterscotch.
Winemaking:Mostle machine harvested at night with some early morning handpicked fruit. Pressed into stainless steel tanks to settle, then rack

ER_2000003033_SJBCABSV.title: Brook Margaret River Cabernet Sauvignon 2022
ER_2000003033_SJBCABSV.description:
St Johns Wine Brook Margaret
River Cabernet... 750ML
ER_2000003033_SJBCABSV.richDescription:
A stylish and elegant Cabernet Sauvignon. Its medium bodied with good intensity and long finish.
Stunning vibrant fruit aromatics; blackberry, cassis, and forest fruits. There's a hint of earthiness and spice adding complexity and a savoury element. The tannins are fine and long and drive the palate. Hint of red berries and pomegranate linger on the finish, while the oak is seamlessly integrated and refined.

ER_2000003033_CKB-18OPTSHZ6PK.title: The Terraces' Shiraz 2018
ER_2000003033_CKB-18OPTSHZ6PK.richDescription:
Bold blackberry, pepper, and liquorice, layered with spice and refined oak, finishing with silky tannins and bright acidity.
Dark, inky, and super intense, this Shiraz bursts with blackberries, pepper, liquorice, and spice on the nose. The palate is rich and concentrated, showcasing powerful fruit complemented by a refined oak influence. Silky, well-structured tannins and balanced acidity provide a long, enduring finish. Truly magnificent, with every sip lingering deliciously.

ER_1000007971_4.title: 1808 Barely Legal 700mL
ER_1000007971_4.richDescription: 1808 Barely Legal” marks the Rum Rebellion of 1808. 100% Sugar Free, 100% Gluten Free. Using the best quality ingredients and state of the art distillation equipment, this double distilled un-aged cane spirit shows the true mark of quality. This product is set apart from the rest as it is not a spirit distilled from a molasses base.

ER_1000007971_3.title: Bushtucker Spiced 700mL
ER_1000007971_3.richDescription: Produced with the use of the finest quality Australian sourced dark brown sugar and double distilled using our 4 plate column still this cane spirit is barrel-aged in an ex Shiraz, French Oak cask for one month and spiced with Kakadu Plum, Lemon Myrtle, Quandong, Wild Rosella and Wattleseed Plus 15 other Spices. There is no sugar in this product and all spices used have been distilled from their source! This truly is a wholly Australian owned and operated small boutique distillery, and extremely

ER_1000007834_9355966000139.title: Heritage Collection Series  3 Apera
ER_1000007834_9355966000139.richDescription: With an approach for our Single Malt that gives great length and vital contribution to the final flavour profile. The Aisling Single Malt Whisky is crafted to expose the Malted Barley produced right here in Australia. The Single Malt has a unique profile and character, which gives a full-bodied complex finish.<br>The Aisling Single Malt Heritage Collection has been handcrafted and matured in 100 litre casks, the aging process of Series 2 Apera was 4.5 years this release has been further ag

ER_1000007652_TLQR19.title: Rose 2019
ER_1000007652_TLQR19.richDescription: 100% Shiraz gives this wine a vibrant pink colour, lovely lifted aromas of raspberry and icing sugar. The palate vibrates with lovely rich fruit flavours finishing more in the dry spectrum.

ER_1000007652_TLQCM16.title: Cab Merlot 2016
ER_1000007652_TLQCM16.richDescription: Grape Varieties: Cabernet Sauvignon 86%; Merlot 14% Purple with crimson edges – looks serious in the glass. Tobacco  leaf – feint cassis –  purple plums – a complex nose which adds weight to the “serious” theme. Quality MR Cabernet leads the charge here. A wine with high cheek- bones. Just ripe cabernet gives this sinew and poise. Merlot is subservient – almost hard to detect. Terrific wine, at almost twice the price.

ER_1000007652_CGSB18.title: Margaret River Sauvignon Blanc 2018
ER_1000007652_CGSB18.richDescription: From the near perfect 2018 vintage this wine is typical of the style that comes from Margaret River tropical fruit mineral layers, and crisp acidity.

ER_1000007652_CGRESSEM16.title: Semillon Reserve Margaret River 2016
ER_1000007652_CGRESSEM16.richDescription: Rich soft and generouswith persistent lime and lemon flavours.beautiful touch of part barrel ferment helps to capture the textural flvours on the palate

ER_1000007652_CGCM16.title: Estate Cab Merlot 2016
ER_1000007652_CGCM16.richDescription: This is a 60-40 blend of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot. The wine is elegant and refined showing a clear red-purple colour; a fresh, bright and breezy wine, with red fruits to the fore and balanced tannins to hold the structure together.

ER_1000007652_ASBS11.title: Premium Museum La Croyance SBS 2011
ER_1000007652_ASBS11.richDescription: This barrel fermented SBS has spent 9 months in French oak lending a sophisticated and harmonious element to this complex yet delicate blend which is reminiscent of the whites from the Graves Region in Bordeaux. Fresh, fragrant and elegant in style, the palate is lively and direct with layers of stone fruit and minerality and only a little toastiness lingering on the very long finish. A serious SBS blend and one to educate your customers.

ER_1000007337_OHPFMSNG.title: Montepulciano
ER_1000007337_OHPFMSNG.richDescription: Montepulciano is an Italian grape varietal which is best enjoyed with pasta dishes, cheese and meats. It has a beautiful bright colour and is really smooth and medium to full bodied. It’s extremely well balanced and has a delicious chocolate and cherry characters, with a hint of almond. It’s best served at 18 degrees and enjoyed with family and friends. It’s a cracker!

ER_1000006954_LSSHZ6PK.title: Margaret River Lifestyle Shiraz 2024
ER_1000006954_LSSHZ6PK.richDescription: Grape variety 89 percent Shiraz 11 percent Fer. Oak maturation Portions of old and new French oak for 12 months. Typical analysis 14.7 percent Alc Vol. Colour Deep red with purple hue. Aroma Rich concentrated and complex the wine opens with ripe dark fruits of plum and mulberry with a delicate floral fragrance aniseed and a dusting of pepper. There is also a meaty edge to the wine with notes of bacon fat and gravy with underlying notes of oak. Palate Rich and plush with a texture defined by silk

ER_1000006954_LSSAB6PK.title: Margaret River Lifestyle Sauvignon Blanc
ER_1000006954_LSSAB6PK.richDescription: Grape variety - 100% Sauvignon Blanc. Oak maturation - None. Colour - Pale straw-green. Aroma - The wine opens with pungent tropical fruit aromas of gooseberry, guava, lychee and passionfruit. There are herbaceous notes of celery leaf and roasted red capsicum with flinty-citrus freshness.Palate Full and textured with balanced acidity. ER_1000006954_FEJRO6PK.title: Margaret River Jack Out The Box Rose 2023
ER_1000006954_FEJRO6PK.description:
Forester Estate Margaret
River Jack Out The... 750ML
ER_1000006954_FEJRO6PK.richDescription: Grape variety 100 percent Malbec. Oak maturation 4 months in 100 percent 4 year old French oak barriques. Colour Pale pink. Aroma A complex and fragrant rose that opens with savoury notes strawberry dried flowers musk brioche flint and spice. Palate Full with a rich creamy mouthfeel and firm acidity. There are flavours of strawberry nougat and musk. A richer style of rose with a dry finish. Food matches Chicken terrine seafood grilled vegetables. Peak drinking Drink now. Viticulture Fruit to mak

ER_1000006954_FEBRU6PK.title: Margaret River Lifestyle Brut Cuvee 2025
ER_1000006954_FEBRU6PK.richDescription: Grape variety, Semillon 66%, Chenin Blanc 31%, Chardonnay 3%. Colour, Pale green, straw. Aroma, Fresh and floral with candied pineapple, lemon sherbet, fennel, pastry and creamy lees complexity. Palate, Light and delicate with a soft creamy texture. There are rich yeasty characters with apple, fennel, candied pineapple, lime and pastry notes. A wine with great drinkability. Food matches, Fresh seafood and light poultry. Punt e Mes literally means "point and a half" in Piedmontese, referring to the flavor being characterised as one ”point” of sweetness and half a point of bitterness. It can be used as a substitute for regular rosso vermouth in drinks such as the Manhattan. Punt e Mes has a strong, distinctive flavour, half-way between regular rosso vermouth and Campari.

251330.vintage: 2023* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

250733.vintage: 2022* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

234761.richDescription: This is everything you’d expect from a quality Clare Valley cabernet. It’s leafy and cedary with mulberry, black olive and herbal notes. Impeccably structured, it has just the right balance of plush fruit richness and fine tannin; a magic combination of power and elegance.

480017.title: Prodigy Shiraz 2012
480017.richDescription: A wine to contemplate, not rush. Truly, a "top grade" Coonawarra shiraz, and there aren't that many of them. From the excellent 2012 vintage. Full bodied, unforced, open, opulent, with restrained elegance. Complex - dark fruit, ripe plums, warm spices, a freshening under-current of red fruit, earthy, silky tannins, toasty oak - very well integrated. Very inviting. Drink now and over the next 2 years.

189179.title: Barley Shochu 720mL
189179.richDescription: Made by the Bungo Meijo Distillery producing premium quality sake and shōchū for over 100 years in Saiki city in the Oita Prefecture, this unblended and undiluted honkaku shōchū is made from 100% Japanese-grown barley polished to 50% grain size and Dianthus flower yeast. It is an award-winning barley shōchū with a fruity and full-flavoured palate and is best savoured straight-up chilled from the freezer or on the rocks.

251290.title: Nero d'Avola
251290.richDescription: Sicily’s number one red grape variety, Nero d’Avola is indigenous to the island. This briliant Nero D'Avola is grown on hillside slopes in the Trapani area, using the traditional Spalliera vine training system.The Terre di Kama Nero d’Avola has a wonderful structure, yet soft tannins and is very approachable. Packed with red berry fruit flavours, it is ideal with red meats and tomato based pasta sauces.
251290.vintage: 2024* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

931395.title: Les Griffons De Pichon Baron 2021
931395.description:
Château Pichon Les Griffons
De Pichon Baron... 750ML
931395.richDescription: 2021 is delicate with white flowers that lead into a classic Cabernet-Sauvignon bouquet with aromas of blackcurrant, licorice, and lovely woody notes. The combination is elegant and refined. The attack is ample and fresh, the mouthfeel is taut and thick, wrapped in a pleasing tannic structure. Flavors of blueberry, ripe cherry, cedar, and mild spices joyfully enrich this powerful wine. It lingers at the finish, sappy with hints of licorice candy. Les Griffons de Pichon Baron is one of the second

906480.title: Chablis 1.5L
906480.richDescription: Perfect for the wine lover that has it all this beautifully presented magnum of Chablis will impress them all. 100% Chardonnay with refreshing acidity, perfect for a crowd.

904059.title: Shiraz Cuvée NV
904059.richDescription: Dense and brooding, with prune and stewed fruits on the nose. The palate is fresh and lively with a touch of slightly sweet dark fruits and chocolate. Superb Value.

875435.richDescription: This Yarra Valley Pinot Noir has a bright medium red hue, lifted strawberry fruit supported by light oak maturation with earthy spice undertones.
875435.vintage: 2020* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

84320.title: Pinot Rose
84320.richDescription: Located on the southeastern shore of Lake Wakatipu, the Remarkables mountain range lives up to its name by rising sharply to create an impressive backdrop for the surrounding waters. This finely textured wine lives up to its namesake. A perfumed, dry-style Rose with enticing red berry aromas. On the palate, sweet and savoury are juxtaposed with fruit weight carrying length and flavour. Juicy acidity brightens the smooth, creamy finish.
84320.vintage: 2021 - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

791359.richDescription: Wynns Michael Shiraz is a powerful yet elegant Coonawarra Shiraz full of vibrant tangy plum, berry jam, mocha-like aromas and a seamless, well sustained medium-bodied palate with fine, ripe tannins.

669580.richDescription: The Moscato is the best dessert wine in the world… and Nivole is constantly the best - the late Michael Broadbent, Director of Christies and Master of Wine. Hand-harvested from select Moscato Bianco vineyards in the Piedmont DOCG, typically with white, sandy soils of maritime origin. The grapes are pressed long and slow, with the juice fermented at low temperatures to capture the varietys typical musky perfume, with fermentation stopped at 5 percent abv. 653750.title: Cabernet Sauvignon 2014
653750.richDescription: If colour tells a story, then this is one of depth and character. Appealing floral notes give nuance to the attractive red fruit so abundant on the nose. Blackcurrant leads an ensembe cast of spices and herbs that act as a perfect foil to this wine's mesmerizing display of fruit.

6008285.richDescription: The grapes for this wine come from various vineyards in four specified, named villages of the Gard district of Provence, near Avignon. This part of France is also the home of the Tavel and Lirac appellations. ‘Les Becs Fins’ is 60% Grenache from vines planted in the late 1950s and 40% Syrah from vines planted in the 1980s. All vineyards are farmed organically on pebbly soils. After fermentation the wine matures for 10 months in concrete tanks before bottling without fining or filtration. The win

6008279.title: Vieilles Vignes Crozes-Hermitage 2021
6008279.richDescription:
The Tardieu-Laurent Vieilles Vignes Crozes Hermitage is 100% Syrah from four sites—Larnage, Battis, Gervans and Coteaux de Mercurol. In the tradition of the much-loved house, all vines used are well-established, being 60 years old or more. One third of this wine is composed of whole bunch fermentation. Spicy and fragrant on the nose, dark berries dominate the palate, with a compelling meatiness. The finish is saline and savoury.



As one of the leading negociants in the Rhone, M

592806.richDescription: Laughing Jack Greenock Shiraz is sourced from vineyards exclusively in the Greenock sub-region of the Barossa Valley. Located in the Valley's western edge, Greenock imparts warm, plush fruit characters with a dark chocolate and leather backbone. The Laughing Jack shows all of these qualities in abundance, especially the dark chocolate aspect with real concentration of flavour. A very powerful wine.

442042.title: Cabernet Sauvignon 2009
442042.richDescription: The last vintage under cork. A wine with a dark side, but also showing abundant red currant and with a framboise element. Lifted and delicious, there's a gentle Chesterfield leather note and dried herb seasoning adding complexity. A wine that's driven by its attractive sweet fruit profile, it should make the end of the decade comfortably, but is a delight to drink now.

The company Laurent Ponsot is neither a “domain” nor a “maison”: it’s a state of mind. This wine, made from 100% Chardonnay, is aged for 10 months in oak barrels with regular stirring to gain depth and complexity. The resulting wine shows aromas which are inviting and expressive, offering a combina

249231.title: Street Art Collection Tempranillo
249231.richDescription: Zinio honours the artists responsible for their striking labels with a nod to the street art that makes the vibrant city of Logrono in the heart of Rioja so special. This brilliant fruit forward tempranillo is grown at an altitude of 550m above sea level on Clay and Limestone soils showing freshness and complexity.Grapes were destemmed and gently crushed before a 24 hour cold soak prior to fermentation in order to achieve maximum flavour extraction. 207964.richDescription: One of the best known producers of the Rhone Valley is Paul Jaboulet Aine. They produce an array of high quality wine from various appellations within the Rhone. Their Ventoux Rouge is from a vineyard dominated by Mont Ventoux. The red wine produced here is 80% grenache and 20% syrah. Average age of the vines is 35 years. The juice is fermented at a relatively low temperature to preserve the juicy fruit characters and soft tannins. The finished wine exhibits great balance and notes of rose petal

206193.title: Prosecco Frizzante
206193.richDescription: A fun filled addition to the range from this renowned Northern Italian producer. The Prosecco (Gleara)  grapes undergo fermentation after light maceration on the skins at a controlled temperature. The wine is then filtered and racked in stainless steel tanks for secondary fermentation to obtain the fine bubbles with the help of carefully selected yeasts. The resulting wine is straw-yellow in colour with delicate floral notes and hints of apple. Perfect for aperitifs and brunch with friends!

198395.title: Langhorne Creek Shiraz
198395.richDescription:
Langhorne creek, once an ancient flood plain, home to our brave farm animals that have arranged themselves for safety amidst rising floor levels. How far have they pushed their luck? Has their karma run out? This wine is full of fresh red fruit aromas with mocca oak undertones, while providing a rich and generous palate full of backberries and spices, followed by a silky tannin finish.
Produced by or on behalf of Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

187563.richDescription: Combined with the fermented extract of fresh raspberries, this wine exhibits the authentic taste of the fruit. Think heightened scent of the berry while the palate offers a subtle but intense taste of raspberry—one for people who can’t get enough of this delicious red jewel.

186149.title: The Devil Shiraz 2020
186149.richDescription: In 2024, we’re celebrating our fiftieth vintage with the release of a new flagship wine.A single block wine that epitomises our meticulous approach to everything we do. Every aspect has been carefully considered to ensure The Devil is the most characterful and expressive wine possible. With just eight barrels produced, The Devil really is in the detail. Gentle and patient winemaking is preferred to ensure that the wine expresses the unique site characters of the House Block. The hand harvested g

176017.title: Pinot Gris 750ml
176017.richDescription: Te Tera means ‘The Other’ in Mãori and defines the exceptional character and expression the Martinborough region is renowned for. Its Pinot Gris is a stunning regional example of this classic French style delivering ripe pear and quince characters, a ripe fruity palate of fleshy weight and richness leaving and a fresh finish.

While Hollywood brings the “razzle-dazzle” reputation, Miraval is one of the world’s most authentic celebrity wine brands. Actor Brad Pitt once dreamed of becoming an architect and his enthusiasm for precision and aesthetic beauty – are encapsulated by this tremendously impactful vermentino. By partnering with the Perrin Family, he found kindred souls who could use their considerable experience to farm and vinify ex
162686.vintage: 2020* - Vintage is not guaranteed and may vary store to store or when delivered.

162130.title: MV Cabernet Sauvignon 2019
162130.richDescription: With a few years of cellaring, this regal McLaren Vale Cabernet Sauvignon from Chapel Hill has grown even more poised and expressive. The wine still proudly reflects its sense of place, but time has brought added depth and harmony. The sweet core of McLaren Vale fruit is now more refined, with dark berries and cassis layered beneath soft, earthy undertones. The once-firm, dusty tannins have mellowed beautifully, giving the wine a smooth, structured finish. Stylish, balanced and impressively matu

162128.title: Cat Amongst The Pigeons Fat Cat Shiraz 2019
162128.description:
Cat Amongst The Pigeons Cat
Amongst The... 750ML
162128.richDescription: The Fat Cat Shiraz has grown into a rich, velvety expression of Barossa power with added depth and finesse. The intense plum and blackberry flavours have softened slightly, now unfolding with layers of dark chocolate, spice, and a touch of savoury earth. The bold fruit is still very much present but now more integrated, balanced by smooth tannins and a long, warming finish. A luxurious and mature Barossa Shiraz that continues to impress with age.

161952.title: Sauvignon Blanc
161952.richDescription: L’Artisan Sauvignon Blanc is a delicious fruit-driven wine with expressive tropical fruit, limes citrus aromas, ample tropical fruit, lemon curd flavours, supple textures and juicy acidity. The grapes are grown in the undulating landscape of the Languedoc Roussillon region. Warm sunny growing conditions are moderated by cooler nights. It is aged two more years than Solear to allow it to develop greater body, depth and more 'flor' character. The final 'solera' stage of Pastora is in Barbadillo's 'Pastora' bodega. It is a true ‘Pasada' with its golden hue, pungent yeast, nut and chamomile flavour and is remarkably smooth.
